spec_match.rationale: Page demonstrates the feature's general idea but doesn't surface the named spec API symbols directly.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles several edge cases (errors, fallbacks, feature detection, denials) — not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Page does not cite the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link — required self-heal anchor.

design_system.rationale: Has 3 raw hex colour value(s) inline — should use --bg-*/--text-*/--accent-* tokens instead.

openQuestions.title: Surface more named spec API for pwa-origin-migration
openQuestions.detail: The spec summary lists API surfaces this concept doesn't currently name on-page. Either rename the controls / readouts to mention them, or add a second concept page that targets the missing surface directly. The reviewer extracted these from the spec: PWA origin migration via web app manifest. New members: migrate_from, migrate_to in manifest. Algorithm "validate origin migration" requires web-app-origin-association on both sides. UA can inherit install state, scope, permissions when migration validates. Edge cases: uninstall during migration, multi-hop migrations (A→B→C), conflicting members. Authors must not declare migrate_to without a valid...

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must cite chromestatus.com/feature/<id> in its 'see also' or references section — this is the self-heal anchor used by the slug cleanup script.

openQuestions.title: Tighten the design-system compliance
openQuestions.detail: Either replace raw hex with --bg-*/--text-*/--accent-* tokens, or pair every button background override with a color override (the global button rule sets both — overriding one alone risks light-on-light).

summary: Workable concept with a couple of gaps. 3 open question(s) queued.
